conflicts: Package alignment required: KIT_A2G_TC387_5V_TFT uses TC38x LFBGA-292. Pin mapping and validation must be aligned to LFBGA-292; do not rely on LFBGA-516 mappings. Provide Port 0 function tables for LFBGA-292 to confirm P00.2–P00.7 (TOUT11–TOUT16) assignments and TOM1 CH5–10 availability.
